name: Cell Observer — cells (abbreviated filename)
description: Cell Observer cells-mode VARIANT where the filename carries only <condition>_<image_num> (2 chunks) and the folders <researcher>/<cell_line>/<experiment>/ carry the rest. Mirrors tools/configs/cell_observer_itziar_colageno_perm_TEST.yaml (round 5, Colageno_permeabilizado batch). Use the 'standard filename' recipe if your filenames carry the full 5-chunk convention. Point at the CELL OBSERVER root (the folder above <researcher>), preview, then ingest. Note: if the <experiment> folder name has underscores or capitals it won't auto-create a valid project short_name — set a hyphenated project_hint per batch (PROJ-05).
